app.header.subtitle: Phase 6B Domain Shell
app.commander.title: Control first. The developer issues intent and makes decisions.
app.commander.subtitle: The center console owns chat, system logs, and parallel task awareness. Files, code, and terminal move into an on-demand data plane drawer.
app.control_plane.title: Control Plane
app.control_plane.subtitle: Tasks, directives, approvals, and telemetry converge here.
app.data_plane.title: Data Plane
app.data_plane.subtitle: Explorer, editor, and terminal live in an on-demand overlay.
settings.title: AI Provider Settings
settings.placeholder.api_key: Enter the API key. Leave empty for local models
settings.save_success: Settings have been saved and applied.
chat.approval_timeout: The approval request timed out and was automatically denied. Please trigger the action again.
chat.feedback.positive: Thanks for the feedback. I will keep improving.
chat.feedback.negative: Feedback received. I will improve the output quality.
chat.panel.title: Chat
chat.hero.title: Control plane is ready
chat.hero.subtitle: Start from a task, self-test, or code intent. The center console carries the control flow and execution feedback.
chat.input.placeholder: Enter a task or question. Enter sends, Shift+Enter adds a newline.
chat.prompt.project_map: Please summarize the project structure with get_project_summary and explain the key modules.
chat.prompt.risk_review: Please review the internal/agent package and identify potential bugs, boundary conditions, and concurrency risks.
chat.prompt.architecture: Please explain the overall architecture and key data flow based on cmd/agy/main.go.

mcp.list.subtitle: Show MCP services recognized by the core and their tool counts
mcp.form.title: Add or Update Service
mcp.form.subtitle: Write declarative config into the core and trigger dynamic tool refresh
mcp.form.name: Service Name

One KEY=VALUE per line
For example DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@host/db
mcp.error.delete: Failed to delete the MCP service.
